title: doc comment: downcast_ref on &dyn Error does not work as documented
description: In parse_error.rs, the SieveError.source field doc says callers can use 'err.source().and_then(|e| e.downcast_ref::<ParseError>())' to get the underlying ParseError. This is incorrect: std::error::Error::source() returns &(dyn Error + 'static) which does not have a downcast_ref() method. The correct pattern requires going through std::any::Any, e.g. '(err.source().unwrap() as &dyn std::any::Any).downcast_ref::<ParseError>()' -- but even that requires a valid coercion. The misleading doc will cause callers to write code that doesn't compile. Fix: remove or correct the downcast example.
